GTG — Consent Mode Validation (Evidon 7654)

Live page running the real Evidon CMP tag + GTM container GTM-K5HBJ7LP. Interact with the CMP banner, then watch the flags below.

Live Consent Mode state (read-only)

Reflects google_tag_data.ics.entries written by the CMP. Refreshes every second. All consent calls are driven by the real Evidon CMP — this panel only observes.

PurposeICS defaultICS update

For the video, pair this with Google Tag Assistant (tagassistant.google.com) → Consent tab. The four required purposes are ad_storage, analytics_storage, ad_user_data, and ad_personalization. Also inspect raw calls with:
dataLayer.filter(e => e[0] === 'consent')
